projects.name: Project Bachpanshala
projects.tagline: Nurturing Young Minds, Building Bright Futures
projects.mission: To unlock every child's right to learn through books, mentorship, and community-led classrooms in underserved villages.
projects.description: Project Bachpanshala ensures quality education for underprivileged children through book distribution, volunteer teaching, and learning support in underserved communities.
objectives: Provide access to books and learning materials
Deploy volunteer teachers in rural areas

successStory.title: Education Opens Doors in Rural Chhattisgarh
successStory.body: A child who could not attend school due to poverty received books and volunteer teaching through Project Bachpanshala. Today, with sustained mentorship, she is pursuing her dream of becoming a teacher and helping others in her village learn to read.
successStory.quote: InAmigos gave me hope when I had none. Now I want to give others that same opportunity.

projects.name: Project Seva
projects.mission: To serve vulnerable families with dignity through nutritious meals, clothing, and relief when they need it most.
projects.description: Project Seva provides food and clothing to the underprivileged — distributing meals and essentials to families in slums, orphanages, and low-income communities.

successStory.title: Meals That Restored Dignity
successStory.body: During a Project Seva food drive in a low-income neighbourhood, families received nutritious meals and essential supplies. Volunteers documented how consistent support helped parents focus on work while children returned to school with full stomachs and renewed confidence.
successStory.quote: When someone cares enough to feed your family, you find strength to rebuild.

projects.name: Project Udaan
projects.mission: To empower women and girls with skills, digital literacy, and confidence to build independent futures.
projects.description: Project Udaan advances women empowerment through skill development, digital literacy, and pathways to financial independence for women and girls.
objectives: Deliver digital literacy and skill training
Run awareness campaigns for girls in science & leadership

successStory.title: Digital Skills, Independent Futures
successStory.body: Through Project Udaan's digital literacy program, a young woman learned online business skills and now earns a steady income supporting her family — demonstrating how women empowerment creates ripple effects across entire households.
successStory.quote: Digital literacy changed my life. Now I am independent and confident.

projects.name: Project Jeev
projects.mission: To protect and care for every stray and abandoned animal through daily feeding, rescue, and community compassion.
projects.description: Project Jeev leads animal welfare efforts including rescue, protection, daily feeding, and medical care for stray and abandoned animals.
objectives: Feed and care for street animals daily
Promote compassion for all living beings

successStory.title: Compassion for Every Life
successStory.body: Project Jeev volunteers feed and care for stray animals daily. Community members now report injured animals for rescue, reflecting a cultural shift toward empathy nurtured through consistent welfare work.
successStory.quote: Every creature deserves care — Jeev taught our children that lesson.

projects.name: Project Prakriti
projects.mission: To restore green cover and inspire communities to live sustainably through plantation, cleanliness, and plastic-free action.
projects.description: Project Prakriti drives environmental conservation through tree plantation, cleanliness drives, plastic-free campaigns, and sustainability awareness.
objectives: Plant trees and restore green cover

successStory.title: From Wasteland to Green Community
successStory.body: Project Prakriti's tree plantation initiative transformed degraded land in a Maharashtra village. Local residents joined cleanliness drives and now maintain green spaces that improve air quality and create livelihood opportunities.
successStory.quote: Our village now has clean air and income from the trees we planted together.

projects.name: Project Vikas
projects.mission: To prepare youth for meaningful careers through internships, mentorship, and real-world social impact experience.
projects.description: Project Vikas enhances employability through internship programs, skill-building workshops, and career readiness for youth across India.
impactStats: Ranked Top Employer on Internshala (5+ years)

successStory.title: Internship to Employment
successStory.body: A Project Vikas intern gained hands-on experience in community management and social work. The ISO-certified certificate and mentorship led to a full-time role — one of 250+ interns who joined the InAmigos team permanently.
successStory.quote: Vikas was not just an internship — it was my pathway to meaningful work.
